meaning: n.伊斯兰教君主的领地,伊斯兰教君主的地位
examples: Before Raffles came to Singapore, we belonged to the Johor Sultanate. Is this not part of our early history?
The Sultanate of Oman occupies the corner of the Arabian Peninsula nearest India, and lies between Dubai and Yemen.
In the Middle East, the sultanate of Oman have stated that they are planning to build seven new seismographic stations to monitor possible quakes and tsunamis.
As a reward, Jakarta passed a law in 1950 making his sultanate a special province.
Jefri has withdrawn his kids from school, decamped to London and cut all ties with the sultanate.
